stemHtml: What is the principle of an INS?

options.a: Gyros and accelerometers on a single platform with at least two accelerometers.
options.b: Gyros on a single platform with accelerometers attached to the aircraft structure.
options.c: Gyros and accelerometers on a single platform with at least two gyroscopes.
options.d: Gyros and accelerometers on a separate platforms.
